name: Black Bean and Salsa Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first five ingredients; mix well.
2. Blend the salsa and vinegar together.
3. Pour the blended mixture over the salad and toss well to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Spoon the salad onto lettuce leaves when ready to serve.
This recipe serves 8, but can be halved for 4 servings. Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CHO: 0g; FAT: 1g; CAL: 116.
